summary: Track personal follow-ups in a durable ledger, with a morning digest of open items.

flags.summary: Where the reminder came from, recorded with `add`.
With `list`, show every reminder instead of only open ones.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.summary: Append a new open reminder; prints the assigned id.

subcommands.name: done
subcommands.summary: Mark a reminder done (errors if unknown or already done).

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.summary: List open reminders, or every reminder with --all.
